## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused (one concern)
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] If the skill changed, it stays short and preserves the token-discipline + guardrails
- [ ] No package version bump (releases are handled by the maintainer)
